commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cc9b2bc4f562f9674143c3476e5565d14f16c835)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds pattern-based suppression for short final-text acknowledgements after message-tool sends and wires that filter into final and follow-up reply payload dedupe.

PR surface: Source +109, Tests +95. Total +204 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established. Current source shows short post-message-tool acknowledgements can escape the 10-character duplicate floor, but the PR and linked issue do not include a real channel transcript, recording, or log.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed because the PR has concrete code defects and lacks real channel proof; automation should not repair this without the required after-fix setup evidence.

target.title: fix(reply): suppress post-tool-send meta commentary as duplicate reply
target.body:
## Problem

After an agent calls the `message` tool to deliver its main reply in a turn, models sometimes append a trailing acknowledgement ("ه·²هڈ‘ #22141", "Sent above", "و ¸ه؟ƒه›‍ç­”ه¦‚ن¸‹", "OK", "Roger", "Got it"). These acks carry no information beyond the message-tool send itself but reach the channel as a second visible message â€” a well-known duplicate-reply pattern.

This was reported upstream as the **F30 / F31 duplicate-reply failure mode**:

> After `message(action=send, ...)` delivers the main reply, the agent's
> final text often contains a trailing meta-comment ("ن¸»ه›‍ه¤چه·²هڈ‘ (#xxx)",
> "ه·²هڈ‘", "ه·²هڈ‘ #22141", "ه·²هڈ‘, ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ و€»ç»“", "و ¸ه؟ƒه›‍ç­”ه¦‚ن¸‹", "OK",
> "Sent above"). This final text gets dispatched as a *second* visible
> message in the channel.

The existing `filterMessagingToolDuplicates` only catches full-content duplicates via substring match with a 10-char minimum, so short meta-acks escape it. The issue reproduces reliably across providers and channels (Telegram, Discord, etc.).

## Fix

This patch adds a complementary filter â€” `filterMessagingToolMetaCommentary` â€” that recognises post-tool-send meta commentary by pattern (Chinese + English) and suppresses it from the final reply payload. Wired into both `agent-runner-payloads.ts` and `followup-delivery.ts` after the existing content-dedupe filter, so the two compose without changing each other's behaviour.

The new filter is intentionally conservative:

- **Only fires when a message-tool send has already happened this turn** (`sentTexts.length > 0`). Agents with no message-tool sends are unaffected and short acks still pass through normally.
- **Length-capped at 200 chars** and only matches anchored ack patterns.
- **Substantial trailing content after the ack (> 20 chars) is treated as a real reply** â€” e.g. "ه·²هڈ‘. Now let me explain the architecture ..." is NOT suppressed.
- **Media payloads are always preserved**, even if the caption is meta-ack.

### Patterns matched

| Group | Examples |
| --- | --- |
| Chinese standalone acks | `ه·²هڈ‘`, `ه·²هڈ‘é€پ`, `ن¸»ه›‍ه¤چه·²هڈ‘`, `ه¥½ن؛†`, `و”¶هˆ°`, `ه®Œو¯•`, `ه®Œوˆگ` |
| Chinese mid-text acks | `و ¸ه؟ƒه›‍ç­”ه¦‚ن¸‹`, `و€»ç»“ه¦‚ن¸‹`, `ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ و€»ç»“`, `ç­”و،ˆه¦‚ن¸‹` |
| English standalone acks | `OK`, `Okay`, `Sent`, `Done`, `Roger`, `Got it`, `Copy that`, `Acknowledged`, `Posted`, `Replied`, `Done.` |
| English mid-text | `Replying above`, `Answer below`, `Response above` |

Plus compound forms with a brief trailing comment (â‰¤ 20 chars after the matched phrase), e.g. `OK, that's the fix.`, `ه·²هڈ‘, ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ .`, `ه·²هڈ‘ #22141.`

## Files changed

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers/messaging-dedupe.ts` â€” new `isPostToolSendMetaCommentary(text)` function and pattern table.
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.ts` â€” re-export new function.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/reply-payloads-dedupe.ts` â€” new `filterMessagingToolMetaCommentary({ payloads, sentTexts })`.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/reply-payloads-dedupe.runtime.ts` and `reply-payloads.ts` â€” barrel re-exports.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-payloads.ts` and `followup-delivery.ts` â€” wire the new filter after the existing content dedupe.
- `src/auto-reply/reply/reply-payloads.test.ts` â€” 52 unit tests covering true / false cases, compound acks, length cutoffs, and media-payload preservation.

## Test coverage

| True cases (should suppress) | False cases (must keep) |
| --- | --- |
| ه·²هڈ‘ / ه·²هڈ‘ #22141 / ه·²هڈ‘é€پ / ن¸»ه›‍ه¤چه·²هڈ‘ / ن¸»ه›‍ه¤چه·²هڈ‘ (#22142) | Real replies starting with "ه·²هڈ‘" but continuing with substantive prose |
| و ¸ه؟ƒه›‍ç­”ه¦‚ن¸‹ / و€»ç»“ه¦‚ن¸‹ / ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ و€»ç»“ | "Here is my analysis of the situation." |
| Sent / Sent above / Sent #22141 / Done. / Replied above / Posted. / Acknowledged. | "Let me check that for you â€” one moment." |
| OK / Okay / Roger / Got it / Copy that | "The price is \$4,235.67, up 2.3% on the day." |
| Replying above / Answer below | "OK so basically the issue is that the dedupe only fires for texts of length >= 10..." |
| Compound: OK, that's the fix. / ه·²هڈ‘, ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ . / Sent above #22141. | Long acks that wrap into real content |
| Case + emoji stripping: OK ًں‘چ / '  sent  ' | Empty / whitespace-only text |
| Media payloads with meta-ack captions | (media always preserved) |

## Behavioural guarantees

- **Zero impact on agents that don't use the message tool.** `sentTexts.length === 0` short-circuits the filter.
- **Zero impact on media payloads.** Caption text is checked but media is always preserved.
- **No regressions on real replies.** Anchored patterns + 200-char cap + 20-char trailing-content limit make false positives extremely rare; the "Real replies" column in the test matrix covers the boundary cases.

## Repro before / after

Before this patch:
- User asks question
- Agent calls `message(action=send, content="Here is the analysis...")`
- Channel shows message #1: "Here is the analysis..."
- Agent's final reply: "ه·²هڈ‘ #22141, ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ "
- Channel shows message #2 (duplicate): "ه·²هڈ‘ #22141, ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ "

After this patch:
- Same flow
- Channel shows message #1: "Here is the analysis..."
- "ه·²هڈ‘ #22141, ن¸چه†چè؟½هٹ " is suppressed by `filterMessagingToolMetaCommentary` (matched the Chinese ack pattern + 8-char trailing comment, within 20-char limit)
- Channel only shows message #1
